seo.title: Private Dining & Banquets — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Private dining rooms and grand ballroom for up to 500 guests. Wedding banquets, corporate events, birthday celebrations, and family gatherings.

hero.heading: Private Dining & Banquets
hero.subheading: Hosting an event? We do banquets for up to 500 guests.
hero.subheadingZh: 举办活动？我们可为多达500位宾客提供宴席服务。

rooms.name: Private Dining Room
rooms.description: Intimate private room perfect for family dinners, business lunches, and small celebrations.
rooms.descriptionZh: 温馨私人用餐室，适合家庭聚餐、商务午宴及小型庆典。

rooms.name: Banquet Hall
rooms.description: Elegant banquet hall for mid-size celebrations, corporate dinners, and milestone birthdays.
rooms.descriptionZh: 优雅宴会厅，适合中型庆典、企业晚宴及重要生日。

rooms.name: Grand Ballroom
rooms.description: Our magnificent grand ballroom — Flushing's finest venue for wedding banquets and large-scale events.
rooms.descriptionZh: 宏伟大宴会厅——法拉盛最顶级的婚宴及大型活动场地。

inquiry.heading: Request a Quote
inquiry.subheading: Tell us about your event and we will respond within 24 hours.
inquiry.subheadingZh: 告知我们您的活动详情，我们将在24小时内回复。

testimonials.name: The Zhang Family
testimonials.text: We hosted our son's wedding reception here for 350 guests. Everything was perfect — the food, the décor, and the service exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Emily Chen, Event Director
testimonials.text: We've held three annual corporate dinners at Grand Pavilion. The professionalism and quality are consistently excellent.
